testcase.name: Supabase Client > should provide verbose info about credentials and client status
testcase.system-out:
[Supabase Test] SUPABASE_URL: https://test.supabase.co [Supabase Test] SUPABASE_KEY: test-k... [Supabase Test] Client available: [33mtrue[39m [Supabase Test] Client methods verified
[Supabase Test] Auth check completed (expected: no user logged in) [Supabase Test] Attempting table query...
[Supabase Test] Tables may not exist yet. Run the SQL schema files first.
testcase.system-err:
[Supabase Test] Instruments table query failed: TypeError: Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'status')
[Supabase Test] Contact submissions query also failed: TypeError: Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'status')
